Uses of Interface
net.sourceforge.plantuml.core.ImageData

Packages that use ImageData
Package
Description
net.atmp
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml
Contains classes for processing PlantUML source files.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.api
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.core
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.directdot
Provides classes used to manage Dot Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.ditaa
Provides classes used to manage Ditaa Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.eggs
Provides classes used to manage PlantUML Easter Eggs.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.jcckit
Provides classes used to manage Jcckit Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.math
Provides classes used to manage ASCII Math format.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sequencediagram
Provides classes used to manage Sequence Diagram.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.sequencediagram.graphic
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.xmi
Provides classes used to manage XML Metadata Interchange (XMI) output format.
